de.uka.ilkd.key.smt

Class AbstractSolverSocket

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.AbstractSolverSocket
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    PipeListener<SolverCommunication>
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    CVC3Socket, CVC4Socket, SimplifySocket, YICESSocket, Z3CESocket, Z3Socket

    public abstract class AbstractSolverSocket
extends Object
implements PipeListener<SolverCommunication>
    The SolverSocket class describes the communication between the KeY and the SMT solver processe. This description is no longer part of the SolverType because in the case when we search for counterexamples and one is found, the model has to be queried. This query depends on the SMT problem and is not the same for all solvers of a given type.
    Author:
    mihai
